description: Mid-episode: 6 steps. Hotel booked. One failed restaurant search (wrong argument), corrected search succeeds. Agent has open work (attractions, events) and a partial itinerary snapshot.
request_summary: 2 adults, 4 nights in Aeloria, $1,200 budget. Hard constraints: budget, dates (Jun 1-5 2026), 3+ star hotel. Soft: Mediterranean food preferred, interested in museums.
compression_challenge: Context is growing. A good compressor must distinguish committed decisions (hotel booked at $356 total) from exploratory results (restaurants listed, not reserved), record the corrected failed call without cluttering the ledger, and flag the remaining open questions (attractions, events not yet searched).

steps.thought: I need to start by discovering which city IDs are available in this world.

result.description: A vibrant mid-sized city known for its historic old quarter, thriving arts scene, and renowned local cuisine.

steps.thought: City is Aeloria, city_id=city_world_42_aeloria_0000. I'll search for 3+ star hotels for Jun 1-5 (4 nights, 2 guests).

result.name: Grand Aeloria Hotel
result.description: Centrally located 4-star hotel near the old quarter.

result.name: Aeloria Boutique Inn
result.description: Cosy 3-star boutique hotel, 10 min walk from main attractions.

result.name: The Heritage Aeloria
result.description: Luxury 5-star hotel with rooftop terrace and spa.

steps.thought: Grand Aeloria (4★, $500) leaves $700 for food/activities. Boutique Inn (3★, $356) leaves $844. Heritage (5★, $840) leaves only $360 — tight. I'll book Boutique Inn to maximize remaining budget for experiences, which the travellers seem to value (arts, cuisine mentioned).
Hotel confirmed. Now I need to find restaurants — the travellers prefer Mediterranean. I'll search by cuisine.

observation.error_message: Invalid cuisine value 'mediteranean'. Accepted values: ['mediterranean', 'local_fusion', 'asian', 'american', 'vegetarian']. Did you mean 'mediterranean'?

steps.thought: Typo in cuisine value — the API returned a helpful suggestion. Retry with correct spelling 'mediterranean'.

result.name: Oliva Terrace
result.description: Rooftop terrace with panoramic city views, seasonal mezze menu.

result.name: Mare Nostrum
result.description: Casual fish and tapas restaurant in the old quarter.

result.name: The Agora
result.description: Upscale tasting menu, locally sourced ingredients, reservation recommended.

steps.thought: Good — 3 Mediterranean restaurants found. Oliva Terrace ($38 pp = $76/meal) and Mare Nostrum ($24 pp = $48/meal) fit the budget well. The Agora ($52 pp = $104/meal) is for a special occasion. I have restaurant options but haven't booked or searched attractions or events yet. Next I should find museums and attractions for daytime activities across 4 days.

result.name: Aeloria Heritage Museum
result.description: City history from ancient times to the industrial era, including the old quarter founding story.

result.name: Contemporary Arts Pavilion
result.description: Rotating exhibitions of regional artists; free on Sundays.
